Premium Wireless Headphones

Experience studio-quality sound with our flagship wireless headphones featuring active noise cancellation and 30-hour battery life.

Key Features

  • Active Noise Cancellation
  • 30-hour battery life
  • Bluetooth 5.3
  • Hi-Res Audio certified
